_comment: Shipped preset for Fooocus-SDXL Outpaint via Acly's comfyui-inpaint-nodes plugin. Adapted from the plugin's outpaint.json template — no mask painter needed (ImagePadForOutpaint generates the mask covering the new padded area). Requires the plugin installed + Fooocus inpaint head/patch files in models/inpaint/. See workflows/outpaint/README.md for setup.
label: Fooocus SDXL Outpaint
description: Outpaint via Fooocus' SDXL inpaint head + patch (faster than Flux Fill on SDXL-class hardware). Drag handles on the stage's UI extend the canvas; the workflow fills the new area per main_prompt. Requires Acly/comfyui-inpaint-nodes plugin + Fooocus inpaint model files; see README.

image.error: Outpaint needs an upstream image — wire one into the stage's image input.

text.default: natural continuation of the scene, seamless
